hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ] && [ "${f##*.}" = "yaml" ]; then out=$(cd /Users/oishifamily/Projects/viveMonte && .venv/bin/python -m vivemonte validate "$f" 2>&1); jq -n --arg ctx "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$ctx}}'; fi; }
